ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text segment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document containing the segment */,
  "segment_number" INTEGER /* Number of the segment within the document */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Content of the text segment */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the text segment */,
  "xpath" TEXT /* XPath location of the text segment within the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the set of coordinates */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text segment */,
  "top" REAL /* Top position of the segment within the document */,
  "left" REAL /* Left position of the segment within the document */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the segment */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the segment */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of entries or nodes associated with the segment */,
  "rotation" REAL /* Rotation of the segment in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_coordinates_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_order" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order information */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text segment */,
  "node_order" INTEGER /* Order of the node within the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_order_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_order_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, annotator, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access control entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_processing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the processing history entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was processed */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_processing_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the search index entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text segment */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword for the search index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_index_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_index_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit trail entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
